mapper.sql: d.id, d.knowledge_folder_id, d.source_path, d.file_name, d.file_type, COALESCE(d.file_size, 0) AS file_size, COALESCE(d.last_modified, 0) AS last_modified, d.content_hash, d.status, d.indexed_at, COALESCE(d.created_at, 0) AS created_at, COALESCE(d.updated_at, 0) AS updated_at, COUNT(c.id) AS chunk_count
d.id AS document_id, d.source_path, d.file_name, d.file_type, c.id AS chunk_id, c.chunk_index, c.content, c.content_hash, c.page_number, c.heading
mapper.select: SELECT FROM documents d LEFT JOIN chunks c ON c.document_id = d.id WHERE d.id = #{id} GROUP BY d.id
SELECT FROM documents d LEFT JOIN chunks c ON c.document_id = d.id GROUP BY d.id ORDER BY d.updated_at DESC

SELECT FROM documents d JOIN chunks c ON c.document_id = d.id LEFT JOIN knowledge_folders f ON f.id = d.knowledge_folder_id WHERE d.id = #{documentId} AND d.status = #{status} AND (d.knowledge_folder_id IS NULL OR f.enabled = 1) ORDER BY c.chunk_index ASC
SELECT FROM documents d LEFT JOIN chunks c ON c.document_id = d.id WHERE d.knowledge_folder_id = #{knowledgeFolderId} GROUP BY d.id ORDER BY d.updated_at DESC
SELECT FROM documents d LEFT JOIN chunks c ON c.document_id = d.id WHERE d.knowledge_folder_id IS NULL GROUP BY d.id ORDER BY d.updated_at DESC

SELECT FROM documents d JOIN chunks c ON c.document_id = d.id LEFT JOIN knowledge_folders f ON f.id = d.knowledge_folder_id WHERE d.status = #{status} AND (d.knowledge_folder_id IS NULL OR f.enabled = 1) ORDER BY d.updated_at DESC, c.chunk_index ASC

SELECT id, document_id, chunk_index, content, content_hash, page_number, heading, COALESCE(token_count, 0) AS token_count, COALESCE(created_at, 0) AS created_at FROM chunks WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY chunk_index ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO documents ( id, knowledge_folder_id, source_path, file_name, file_type, file_size, last_modified, content_hash, status, indexed_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{knowledgeFolderId}, #{sourcePath}, #{fileName}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{lastModified}, #{contentHash}, #{status}, #{indexedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET knowledge_folder_id = COALESCE(excluded.knowledge_folder_id, documents.knowledge_folder_id), source_path = excluded.source_path, file_name = excluded.file_name, file_type = excluded.file_type, file_size = excluded.file_size, last_modified = excluded.last_modified, content_hash = excluded.content_hash, status = excluded.status, indexed_at = excluded.indexed_at, updated_at = excluded.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM documents WHERE knowledge_folder_id = #{knowledgeFolderId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE documents SET indexed_at = #{indexedAt} WHERE id = #{documentId}
UPDATE documents SET indexed_at = NULL WHERE id = #{documentId}
UPDATE documents SET indexed_at = NULL WHERE knowledge_folder_id = #{knowledgeFolderId}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'PARSED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS parsed_document_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'PARSED' AND indexed_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS unindexed_document_count, MAX(indexed_at) AS last_indexed_at FROM documents LEFT JOIN knowledge_folders f ON f.id = documents.knowledge_folder_id WHERE documents.knowledge_folder_id IS NULL OR f.enabled = 1
